programme.title: Day 1 - Two Phases – 1.40m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. The event brings together leading international riders competing in top-level Jumping and Dressage, including Olympic and world champions, highlighting precision, technique, and excellence on one of the sport’s most prestigious stages.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just two of their last 37 home league games against Aston Villa, going down 1-0 both times in December 2009 and September 2021. Following their 2-1 win in December, Aston Villa are looking to complete the league double over Manchester United for the first time since 1954-55.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just two of their last 37 home league games against Aston Villa, going down 1-0 both times in December 2009 and September 2021. programme.title: Liverpool vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 31 home league games against Tottenham Hotspur, and are unbeaten in 14 since a 2-0 loss in May 2011. Tottenham Hotspur have won just one of their last 16 Premier League games against Liverpool, losing the last four in a row since a 2-1 home win in September 2023.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Villa’s only previous time hosting Lille in major European competition came in the 2023-24 UEFA Conference League, winning 2-1 in the first leg of a quarter-final tie; the Villans lost 2-1 in the second leg but did eventually progress on penalties. Lille have never won on nine previous visits to England in major European competition, losing their last eight in a row since a 0-0 draw with Manchester United at Old Trafford in the 2005-06 UEFA Champions League group stage.

programme.title: EN EPL The Art Of.. | E2 - Goalkeeping
EN EPL The Art Of.. | E2 - Goalkeeping
Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Villa’s only previous time hosting Lille in major European competition came in the 2023-24 UEFA Conference League, winning 2-1 in the first leg of a quarter-final tie; the Villans lost 2-1 in the second leg but did eventually progress on penalties. Lille have never won on nine previous visits to England in major European competition, losing their last eight in a row since a 0-0 draw with Manchester United at Old Trafford in the 2005-06 UEFA Champions League group stage.

programme.title: EN EPL The Art Of.. | E2 - Goalkeeping
EN EPL The Art Of.. | E2 - Goalkeeping
Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: SF2 - Day 10 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Day 1 - Men - Cancun P2 - Premier Padel -2026
programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Final - Day 11 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: beIN Champions - UEFA Champions League 2025/2026

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.desc: Each EPL Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 27
programme.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: World Cup 2026 Amazing Facts - Group H (#8)
programme.desc: What are the most amazing facts for the Group H for the next World Cup 2026

programme.title: ATP Tour - Magazine 2026
programme.desc: ATP Tour This Week It is comprised of the various feature stories created by ATP Media and ATP Tour

programme.title: EPL Stories - Unai Emery - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Paris Fc Derby in Paris
programme.desc: Paris, one city, two clubs, a story that begins anew. After a 46 years absence, with a new management, new ideas, Paris FC wants to find his place in the top French clubs.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs Manchester United - English Premier League
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bruno Fernandes has 13 Premier League assists this season, the most by a Manchester United player in a single campaign since Antonio Valencia in 2011-12. Only David Beckham in 1999-00 and Nani in 2010-11 have ever provided more in a single campaign in the competition for the club. Having failed to register a goal involvement in any of his first 15 Premier League appearances for Newcastle, Jacob Ramsey has now either scored or assisted in each of his last three. He’s never scored or assisted in four consecutive league games before.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bruno Fernandes has 13 Premier League assists this season, the most by a Manchester United player in a single campaign since Antonio Valencia in 2011-12. Only David Beckham in 1999-00 and Nani in 2010-11 have ever provided more in a single campaign in the competition for the club. Having failed to register a goal involvement in any of his first 15 Premier League appearances for Newcastle, Jacob Ramsey has now either scored or assisted in each of his last three. He’s never scored or assisted in four consecutive league games before.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Newcastle United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have won 11 of their last 12 Premier League home games against Newcastle since a 2-0 loss in May 2012 under Roberto Di Matteo. Newcastle have avoided defeat in five of their last seven Premier League games against Chelsea, more times than they had in their previous 15.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 31 home league games against Tottenham Hotspur, and are unbeaten in 14 since a 2-0 loss in May 2011. programme.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.title: beIN Champions - UEFA Champions League 2025/2026
programme.desc: beIN Champions is a look through the best of the action and the unusual stories and stats and facts from the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: EPL Netbusters 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights of the Premier League Matchweek from an alternative angle. A look back at every goal from every game using the best ISOs and Slow Motion angles.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: World Cup 2026 Amazing Facts - Group H (#8)
programme.desc: What are the most amazing facts for the Group H for the next World Cup 2026

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Leeds United - English Premier League
programme.desc: Crystal Palace are unbeaten in their last seven home league games against Leeds since a 2-1 loss in the Championship in March 2006. Following their 4-1 win at Elland Road in December, Leeds are looking to complete the league double over Crystal Palace for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: Sporting Braga vs Ferencváros - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Sporting Braga have lost two of their three games against Hungarian opponents in Europe, but did win the only occasion in which they’ve hosted one: 2-0 v Györi ETO in the 1966-67 Cup Winners’ Cup. Ferencváros’ only previous away game against a Portuguese opponent in European competition was in October 1994, losing by six goals to nil against FC Porto in the Cup Winners’ Cup.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. This will be Stuttgart’s third away trip to Portugal in major European competition, previously drawing 2-2 with Vitória Setúbal in the 1973-74 UEFA Cup and losing 2-1 at Benfica in the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Burnley vs A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League
programme.desc: Having won six of their first eight Premier League games against Bournemouth, Burnley are now winless in their last three. programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Real Betis vs Panathinaikos - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Real Betis have lost just twice in nine UEFA Europa League games this season, but both have come against Greek opposition: PAOK Salonika in the league phase and Panathinaikos in the first leg of this tie. programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. programme.title: Day 1 - Men - Cancun P2 - Premier Padel -2026
programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

Sporting Braga vs Ferencváros - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Sporting Braga have lost two of their three games against Hungarian opponents in Europe, but did win the only occasion in which they’ve hosted one: 2-0 v Györi ETO in the 1966-67 Cup Winners’ Cup. Ferencváros’ only previous away game against a Portuguese opponent in European competition was in October 1994, losing by six goals to nil against FC Porto in the Cup Winners’ Cup.

Freiburg vs Genk - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: SC Freiburg’s only previous game in major European competition against a Belgian side saw them lose 1-0 in the first leg of this tie. Genk have never won on four previous visits to Germany in major European competition, with this their first since a 1-1 draw at Stuttgart in the 2012-13 UEFA Europa League round of 32.

programme.title: Jannik SINNER (ITA) vs Daniil Medvedev - Final - Day 11 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: Jannik SINNER (ITA) vs Daniil Medvedev - Final - Day 11 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. programme.title: Saint-Raphael vs Cesson-Rennes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Umm Salal vs Qatar SC - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W19
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Barnsley vs Wigan Athletic - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - League One 2025/2026
programme.desc: Live and exclusive action from the EFL (English Football League) One. EFL One is the third-tier in the English football league system. At the end of each season three teams are promoted to the EFL Championship and the four clubs that finished at the bottom of EFL League One are relegated to EFL League Two. The season runs from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: Racing Santander vs Albacete - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.
